AI Project Manager

AI-Powered Project Management

Collaborate in real-time with your team. Create tasks using natural language. Get AI-powered suggestions for scheduling and prioritization.

Key Features

Multi-Tenant

Isolated workspaces for each organization with row-level security

Real-Time Collaboration

See changes instantly with WebSocket-powered live updates

AI-Powered

Natural language task creation and smart scheduling suggestions

Fine-Grained Permissions

Organization, project, and task-level access control

Ready to get started?
